final_prompt.prompt:
Create an instructional infographic showing how to deploy Hermes in a Docker container and integrate with GLMCodingPlan (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a clean technical documentation aesthetic — exact visual treatment is yours
Composition: must be a 4-step numbered layout (1-2-3-4), clear visual hierarchy with step numbers prominently displayed
Subject: must include Docker container deployment workflow for Hermes and GLMCodingPlan integration
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a professional tech tutorial atmosphere — exact lighting is yours
Color palette: needs a clean, readable direction — exact color scheme is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include step labels "步骤 1", "步骤 2", "步骤 3", "步骤 4", and descriptive text for Docker deployment and Hermes + GLMCodingPlan integration
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve 4 clearly numbered steps with visual separation; must show Docker container context and GLMCodingPlan integration
Avoid: must avoid cluttered layout that obscures step sequence; must avoid English text unless specified
